schemaTitle: CRUK CDP — supporter intelligence (use case pack)
schemaDescription: Derived from CR CDP use cases: omnichannel personalization, predictive offers (e.g. Race for Life), and predictive supporter modelling (NBA, churn, propensity). Custom attributes under tenant namespace; align identities with your existing profile setup.
fieldGroupTitle: CRUK CDP — supporter intelligence field group
fieldGroupDescription: Cancer Research UK supporter / info seeker attributes for personalization, offers, and model-driven scores.
tenantObjectDescription: CRUK-specific supporter signals and model outputs supporting CDP use cases.

constituentRole.description: Relationship to CRUK (supporter vs info seeker).

primaryEngagementChannel.description: Preferred or dominant outbound / owned channel for personalization (email, sms, social, paid_media, web, etc.).

personalizationPriorityRank.description: Optional ranking from segmentation / orchestration for offer or journey prioritisation.

raceForLifeInterestLevel.description: Inferred or stated interest in Race for Life programmes.

hasViewedRaceForLifeContent.description: Has viewed Race for Life content (supports predictive offer use case).

hasCompletedRaceForLifeTransaction.description: Completed a Race for Life–related transaction (e.g. registration); used to suppress irrelevant discount paths.

lastOfferCampaignCode.description: Code or ID of the last presented marketing offer campaign.

lastOfferPresentedAt.description: When the last offer was presented.

lastOfferAccepted.description: Whether the last presented offer was accepted / converted.

predictiveModelOutputs.description: Scores and metadata for NBA, churn, propensity, and related models.

modelBundleVersion.description: Version label for the packaged model outputs.

nextBestActionRecommendation.description: Recommended next best action key or label from modelling.

nextBestActionScore.description: Optional ranking score for the recommended action.

churnRiskScore.description: Churn risk score (use consistent scale 0–1 or document externally).

propensityToDonateScore.description: Propensity to donate score (use consistent scale 0–1 or document externally).

scoresComputedAt.description: When predictive scores were last computed.

personalizationSegmentCodes.description: Segment or audience codes used for dynamic content and omnichannel personalization.

useCaseTags.description: Which CR CDP capability areas this record supports (documentation / governance).
